title: App Review
html: Stub. Apple's gating process for App Store releases. Bounced Brotein's subscription localization twice in August 2025 ("Developer Action Needed"); also surfaced the trademark name-collision blocker. Yahir handles it via reviewer notes scripting the test path + sandbox tester accounts.

related.label: Brotein App Review contact + auto-renewable IAP list at submission
